note: The HL 120 TR/TRM engine documented in Nm 261/237 is the same engine covered by D 652/50c (Panzer III / StuG engine repair instructions), so shared chassis/engine vocabulary lives in the D-652-series glossary and is reused here rather than re-translated. This file adds only terms specific to Maybach's own manufacturer documentation (spare-parts-catalogue format, etc.), shared across whichever Maybach engine manuals this series comes to hold (HL 42, HL 57/62, HL 108/120, HL 230, ...). Term ids start at 200 to stay clear of D-652-series' own series-term-001..143 range, since this glossary's 'extends' chains into that file.

terms.en-GB: Ermeto (proprietary tube-fitting system: sealing cone / union nut)
terms.es-ES: Ermeto (sistema de racores patentado: cono de estanqueidad / tuerca de racor)
